rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §33.208 governs notice requirements for school extracurricular athletics. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 33.208. NOTICE REQUIRED. (a) A school that offers an extracurricular athletic activity shall provide to each student participating in an extracurricular athletic activity and to the student's parent or guardian a copy of the text of Sections 33.201-33.207 and a copy of the University Interscholastic League's parent information manual.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this athletics-notice statute.
